title: Knarfy's Dumb Potions Mod: CE
description: The community-maintained version of Knarfy's Dumb Potions mod (made with permission)! All the same features *and* even new ones!
body:
# Knarfy's Dumb Potions Mod: CE

![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/knarfys-dumb-potions-mod-ce?style=for-the-badge)
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/MIXINS-NONE-blue?style=for-the-badge)

The community-maintained version of Knarfy's Dumb Potions mod (made with permission)! All the same features *and* even new ones!

Go check out the original mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/knarfys-dumb-potions) and the video [here](https://youtu.be/fNqU9o4Udy8)!

![Proof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92105b0b6b7282805665eb4688c11e8febeecf1c.png)

### This mod includes 13 new potions based on comments from YouTube!

Each potion does something different, and combinations of different potion effects can result in some crazy chaos!

![Dumb Potion Ideas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/600d6812c4487193973e6a2ec0b4ad11c38f56e6.png)

As of now, these potions do not have brewing recipes. But, you can get any of them through the creative inventory, or you can use the `/givepotions` command to give yourself a shulker box with all of them sorted by Level.

Additionally, you can use the `/resetall` command to help reset the effects of the potions if you drank too many! A bucket of milk is also handy to have around!

**Added features for the CE version include:**
- A better UI for the Potion of Subscribe
- A better shulker box for Potions
- SystemZee spawning into your world (if he's not already there)
- Removal of unnecessary/duplicate code & internal chat commands
- General stability and method improvements across the mod

*Thanks for being a supporter of Knarfy's content! Your views on videos and interactions with mods like this help us to create the best content we can for you! Enjoy the mod and all the chaos to be had with it!*

### !!! Warning for Content Creators !!!

The Potion of Theme Song includes songs from Epidemic Sound! These could get your video copyright claimed if you don't have a subscription! You can find more information about Epidemic Sound on their website: https://www.epidemicsound.com/

### Dependencies

- [Identity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/identity) (not on Modrinth)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
